title: Better Nameprotect
body:
# NameProtect

NameProtect is a client-side Minecraft mod that changes your displayed name.  
It's useful for avoiding stream sniping, protecting your identity, or hiding alt accounts.

## Features

- Replaces your in-game name locally
- Prevents accidental leaks during recording or streaming
- Lightweight and easy to configure
- Supports multiple protection modes

## Commands

All commands are client-side and do not require server support.

### New Commands

- `/nameprotect mode <off|everyone|self>`  
  Sets the protection mode:
  - `off` – disables name protection
  - `everyone` – replaces your name for all players including yourself
  - `self` – replaces only your own view of your name

- `/nameprotect change <new name>`  
  Changes your name to the specified value.

### Legacy Commands (deprecated)

- `/nameprotect toggle <on|off>`  
  Enables or disables name protection manually.

- `/nameprotect change <name>`  
  Old version of the change command.

---

**Note:** This mod only affects what *you* see client-side. Other players will still see your real username unless you use alt accounts or spoofers.
